name: hitmonlee
flavor_text: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

moves.name: rolling-kick
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: focus-energy
moves.effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.

moves.name: fake-out
moves.effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.

moves.name: double-kick
moves.effect: Hits twice in one turn.

moves.name: meditate
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: revenge
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.

moves.name: sucker-punch
moves.effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.

moves.name: wide-guard
moves.effect: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

moves.name: blaze-kick
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: mind-reader
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.

moves.name: jump-kick
moves.effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: mega-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: foresight
moves.effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: aura-sphere
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: bide
moves.effect: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: bulk-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: bulldoze
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: captivate
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages if it’s the opposite gender.

moves.name: close-combat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: coaching
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: detect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: earthquake
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: focus-punch
moves.effect: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.

moves.name: low-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: low-sweep
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: lunge
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: mega-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: metronome
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: natural-gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the held berry.

moves.name: poison-jab
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: power-up-punch
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rage
moves.effect: If the user is hit after using this move, its Attack rises by one stage.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: retaliate
moves.effect: Has double power if a friendly Pokémon fainted last turn.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: rock-climb
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: rock-slide
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: rock-smash
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: seismic-toss
moves.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.

moves.name: skull-bash
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: stomping-tantrum
moves.effect: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.

moves.name: stone-edge
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: strength
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: submission
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: superpower
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: throat-chop
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: vacuum-wave
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: work-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

moves.name: bullet-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: counter
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.

moves.name: feint
moves.effect: Hits through Protect and Detect.

moves.name: high-jump-kick
moves.effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: mach-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: rapid-spin
moves.effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.

moves.name: covet
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: dynamic-punch
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: laser-focus
moves.effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.

moves.name: mimic
moves.effect: Copies the target’s last used move.

moves.name: role-play
moves.effect: Copies the target’s ability.

abilitiesDetailed.name: reckless
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.

abilitiesDetailed.name: unburden
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.
